dict.string: Berean Lens uses the camera to analyze scripture, sermon content, and events in your environment.
AMEN uses the microphone for voice prayer recording, sermon capture, and Berean voice study sessions.
AMEN accesses your photo library so you can share photos, set your profile picture, and attach media to posts.
AMEN uses your location to find churches near you and to show relevant local community content.
AMEN uses your location in the background to remind you when you arrive at or leave a saved church location.
AMEN uses Siri to let you send prayer requests and messages to your community hands-free.
AMEN uses speech recognition to transcribe voice prayers, sermons, and Berean voice queries.
AMEN reads your calendar to surface upcoming church events and spiritual milestones in your Community feed.
Lets you export trusted contacts for offline access during emergencies — contacts never leave your device except in the file you explicitly save.
AMEN reads Fitness data (steps, mindful minutes) so the Spiritual Rhythm feature can connect your physical wellness to your spiritual formation journal. No health data is shared with third parties.
AMEN writes mindfulness session records to HealthKit so you can track your prayer and meditation time alongside other wellness data.
We'll send you reminders about church service times and when you're near your saved churches
AMEN uses analytics to improve app performance and personalize content. No data is sold to third parties.
